findings.description: The code example in s1 is truncated. The source includes a third `<field:password title="パスワード（確認用）">` element and a `<field:hint>半角英数記号20文字以内</field:hint>` element, both of which are omitted from the knowledge file. The `field:hint` tag appears nowhere else in the knowledge file, so an AI assistant would have no indication this widget tag exists.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines: `<field:password title="パスワード（確認用）" required="true" maxlength="20" sample="password">` and `<field:hint>半角英数記号20文字以内</field:hint>` are present in the source code block but absent from the knowledge file's code example.
